languages.text: "Признайся, на самом деле ты главный умник в этой паре, да?"
"Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"
languages.original_text: "Признайся, на самом деле ты главный умник в этой паре, да?"

traits.locale_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"
"Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"
"Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

languages.text: «Admítalo: usted es el inteligente del equipo, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

traits.locale_text: «Admítalo: usted es el inteligente del equipo, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: “承认吧，你们两个之中，你才是真正聪明的那一个，对吧？”
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

traits.locale_text: “承认吧，你们两个之中，你才是真正聪明的那一个，对吧？”

languages.text: « Avouez-le, c'est vous le cerveau de ce partenariat, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

traits.locale_text: « Avouez-le, c'est vous le cerveau de ce partenariat, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Gebt es zu, Ihr seid der eigentliche Kopf dieser Partnerschaft, oder?"
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

traits.locale_text: "Gebt es zu, Ihr seid der eigentliche Kopf dieser Partnerschaft, oder?"

languages.text: "認めろよ、このパートナーシップの中で本当に賢いのはお前だろ？"
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"

languages.text: "Doğruyu söyle. Bu ortaklıkta zeki olan aslında sensin, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Admit it, you're really the clever one in this partnership, aren't you?"
